summary: Pipeline Page Redesign V2 (Kanban Board) - Frontend testing completed successfully. All 12 requested features verified. The new premium Apple-level design with dark hero carousel, 6-column Kanban board, and Upcoming Events section works correctly in both light and dark themes.
critical_code_review_comments: PipelinePage.js is well-structured at ~690 lines with clear component separation (ActionsHeroCarousel, UpcomingEventsSection, KanbanBoard, KanbanCard, MeasurablesGuidanceBanner)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Responsive grid correctly implemented with 6->3->2 columns breakpoints
Dark theme support works correctly with CSS variables
Match scoring integration working - shows percentages from V2 match-scores API
CTA button logic correctly varies by stage (Start Outreach, Follow Up, View Journey)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline page fully redesigned with Kanban board. Test athlete Emma has 12 programs: 9 in Added, 2 in Outreach (Stanford 64%, UCLA 71%), 1 in Talking (University of Florida 70%). Stanford shows 'Overdue 2d', UCLA shows 'Due in 1d'. Upcoming Events section has 3 events. Measurables guidance banner appears since profile is incomplete.

Hero_Carousel.actions_needed_today_label: PASS - Uppercase label visible at top of dark premium card
Hero_Carousel.school_name_display: PASS - Shows university name (Stanford, UCLA, etc)
Hero_Carousel.badges: PASS - Shows match %, stage (D1), due date (Overdue 2d)
Hero_Carousel.context_text: PASS - Personalized context like 'It's been 2 days since your last contact'
Hero_Carousel.cta_button: PASS - 'Follow Up' or 'Start Outreach' based on stage
Hero_Carousel.progress_rail: PASS - 6-stage rail on right side of card
Hero_Carousel.next_preview: PASS - Shows 'Next: Follow up with UCLA' at bottom

Carousel_Navigation.pagination_dots: PASS - 6 clickable dots, active dot is teal/expanded
Carousel_Navigation.dot_click: PASS - Clicking dots changes carousel slide

Upcoming_Events.section_visible: PASS - Shows below hero, above kanban
Upcoming_Events.events_listed: PASS - 3 events: Stanford Virtual Info Session, UF Elite Camp, Club Championships
Upcoming_Events.dates_shown: PASS - Tue Mar 17, Sat Mar 21, Fri Apr 3

Kanban_Board.six_columns: PASS - Added(9), Outreach(2), Talking(1), Visit(0), Offer(0), Committed(0)
Kanban_Board.empty_states: PASS - 'No offers yet' in Offer column, '—' in Committed

Kanban_Cards.school_name: PASS - University name truncated if long
Kanban_Cards.division_conference_tags: PASS - D1, D2, D3, Pac-12, SEC, Big 12 tags

Hero_CTA.click_navigation: PASS - Clicking CTA navigates to school's journey page

Guidance_Banner.visible_when_incomplete: PASS - Shows 'Improve your match accuracy' message

Theme_Compatibility.dark_mode: PASS - Dark navy background with proper contrast

Archived_Section.not_visible_for_test_user: INFO - No archived schools for Emma Chen, section correctly hidden
